data.name: My Cute Roommate 2
data.detailed_description:
My Cute Roommate 2 isn’t just a sequel – it’s a wild, stand-alone adventure in the MCR universe!

Step into Derek’s story: the unforgettable supporting character from the first game is now the main event.

Never played the original? No problem — jump right in! This is your ticket to a crazy erotic adventure that will hook you from the very first click.

You’re Derek, fresh out of high school and desperate to escape an overbearing mom and the nightmare of military school. Your way out? A student exchange to a far-off country. But fate has other plans: a bizarre creature gives you two insane gifts — a massive new “package” and a sarcastic inner voice that becomes your personal tormentor, devil, and chaos engine.

This isn’t just an advisor — it’s your new “boss” who comments on every step and pushes you into wild choices!

“Yeah, it’s me — your new boss. Buckle up, buddy. Things are about to get crazy!”

The madness starts at 30,000 feet: a mysterious woman claiming to be a secret agent ropes you into a spy plot.

The mission? Infiltrate the home of a suspected terrorist — who just happens to be your new host family!

Expect seductive roommates, secret agents, students, steamy encounters, risky plans, and total insanity.

Tame your inner demon, uncover secrets, and claim victories in a world where lust, humor, and spy games collide!

🔥 Features you’ll love:

• Brand new, stand-alone story: No need to play the first game.

• Open-world exploration and freedom

• Explicit 18+ animated scenes

• Unique inner voice mechanic

• Dynamic minigames

• Branching paths and multiple endings

• Beautiful visual style

My Cute Roommate 2 is your forbidden pleasure:

🔹 A huge “gift” and a snarky inner voice that steals the spotlight

🔹 Steamy passion, spy intrigue, and wild humor

🔹 Tons of interactivity with minigames

🔹 A seductive world where your desires run the show

data.short_description: A wild 18+ visual novel about a guy with a huge cock, a snarky inner voice, lots of sexy girls, explicit scenes, spy intrigue, and crazy minigames. A new story in the MCR universe!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 印尼語, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文, 越南文, 波蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.4 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
